narrative:
Fairfield County has 110,605 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 11.9 percentage points. Gen X are the largest generational cohort at 26.6% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.8% D−R vs -20.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
